name: Shenzhen Crastal Technology CO.,LTD.
summary: Shenzhen Crastal Technology Co.,Ltd. provides small kitchen appliances, and ancillary products and services. The company offers pots, electric kettles, water dispensers, and ovens through offline and online platforms. It sells its products in Europe, the United States, Australia, the Middle East, and other countries and regions. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
